3294100.name: Animal Tilt-A-Show
3294100.description: Animal Tilt-a-Show is a relaxing casual logic game where your task is to stack a variety of adorable circus animals on a wobbly seesaw to maintain perfect balance! Test your skill and logical thinking as you carefully place elephants, lions, donkeys, and more, each with their own unique weight and shape. With colorful visuals and progressively tricky levels, Animal Tilt-a-Show is the perfect game for all ages. How many animals can you balance before the show tips over? Step right up and give it a try!
3294100.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
